SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 10:09am
Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Transport Workers Union appears through attorney Kenneth Absalom with Mr. Scott. Respondents do not appear. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Newman.

Judge Newman requests a brief to be submitted by Friday.

10:23am
Matter is submitted pending receipt of brief.
